title: Kenyan Date Crumble
description: A warm and comforting dessert that showcases sweet dates in a crispy Kenyan-inspired topping.

ingredients.name: kenyan spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cinnamon, cardamom, and ginger

instructions: In a bowl, mix the dates, kenyan spices, and coconut sugar.
Transfer the date mixture to a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix the crumbly topping and melted butter until crumbly.
Top the date mixture with the crumbly topping.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
